description.value:
Adeptus Mechanicus

The Adeptus Mechanicus, the Priesthood of Mars, is an empire within an empire — a vast techno-religious organisation devoted to the Machine God and the preservation and discovery of technology. Its adepts replace their flesh with blessed machinery, seeking to become closer to the Omnissiah through augmentation. A character from the Mechanicus brings technical expertise, logical thinking, and the blessings of the Machine God to any warband.

Background Aptitudes

Knowledge, Tech

Starting Skills

Common Lore (Adeptus Mechanicus), Logic, Security or Tech-Use

Starting Talent

Weapon Training (Solid Projectile)

Background Bonus

Replace the Weak Flesh: A Mechanicus character starts with the Mechanicus Implants Trait, gaining the benefits of cranial circuitry, a potentia coil, and other standard augmetics. They may also replace a limb with a cybernetic replacement at character creation.

specialAbilities.name: Replace the Weak Flesh
specialAbilities.description: A Mechanicus character starts with the Mechanicus Implants Trait, gaining the benefits of cranial circuitry, a potentia coil, and other standard augmetics. They may also replace a limb with a cybernetic replacement at character creation.

system.notes: Gains the Mechanicus Implants Trait at character creation.
